author: y4rr
content:
Result (READY-FOR-AUDIT-WITH-ESCALATIONS): All Phase 3 evidence floor met.

Migrations applied:
- vit.rs PatchEmbed: 1 site, removed 14 LoC manual loop, added 3 LoC primitive chain (view->permute->contiguous).
- convnext.rs nhwc_from_nchw + nchw_from_nhwc: 2 helpers, removed ~50 LoC of indexed loops, added 2 LoC permute().contiguous() each.
- swin.rs stage_forward downsample-in/out + main forward post-patch-embed + IntermediateFeatures sibling: 4 sites, removed ~70 LoC of indexed loops, added view/permute/contiguous chains.

Probe: 5 patterns asserted byte-identical between manual loops and primitive chains; runs BEFORE migration as the safety net for #18 (mass workaround propagation).

Outcomes:
- ViT-B/16: REPORTED — schema divergence (blocks.<N>.norm1.* vs encoder.layers.encoder_layer_<N>.ln_1.*) escalated as #999.
- ConvNeXt-T: REPORTED — depthwise 7x7 divergence escalated as #997.
- Swin-T: REPORTED — shifted-window attention divergence escalated as #998.

Out-of-Phase-3-scope CPU-pull patterns (cls_token concat, pos_embed broadcast, batched MLP unrolling, manual mean reduction) escalated as #1000.

Tests: 121 pass + 42 ignored + 0 fail in conformance_vision_models; 5/5 probe tests pass; full vision crate test result: ok across all suites. Clippy clean. NO changes to ferrotorch-core/src/ or ferrotorch-nn/src/. CHANGELOG ### Changed entry added citing #986/#987 closure.
